# Noori — Luxury Lab-Grown Diamond Jewelry (Full Context)

## Brand Overview
Noori is a Canadian luxury jewelry brand specializing exclusively in lab-grown diamond jewelry. Founded by Amaan Kler, Noori's mission is to prove that luxury doesn't have to come at someone else's expense. The brand creates heirloom-quality pieces — pendants, earrings, and bracelets — using IGI-certified lab-grown diamonds set in 14K and 18K gold (yellow, white, and rose).

Noori partners with UNICEF, contributing to children's programs with every purchase. The brand ships to Canada and the United States with free standard shipping and a 30-day return policy.

## What Makes Noori Different
1. **Diamond Quality**: Every Noori diamond is graded D–F colour and VS1–VVS1 clarity by the International Gemological Institute (IGI) — the top tier of diamond grading. Stones are precision-cut to ideal proportions for maximum brilliance.
2. **Ethical Sourcing**: All diamonds are grown using Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD) technology — 100% conflict-free, no mining, significantly lower environmental impact than mined diamonds.
3. **Price Transparency**: Lab-grown diamonds offer the same chemical, physical, and optical properties as mined diamonds at 40–60% lower cost. Noori passes these savings to customers.
4. **Craftsmanship**: Each piece is handcrafted with attention to detail — from diamond cut cable chains to precision-set prongs.
5. **Social Impact**: Partnership with UNICEF ensures every purchase contributes to children's education and welfare programs.
6. **Lifetime Warranty**: Covers manufacturing defects, loose stones (with annual inspection), and structural integrity.

## Product Catalog

### The Vela Collection
Noori's signature line of solitaire jewelry, designed for everyday luxury.

#### Pendants
- **Round Vela Pendant**: Round brilliant lab-grown diamond solitaire on a 1.2mm diamond-cut cable chain (18" with adjustable rings at 16" and 17"). Available in Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold. Karat options: 14K, 18K. Carat weight options: 1ct, 2ct. Starting from approximately $2,175 USD.
- **Princess Vela Pendant**: Princess-cut lab-grown diamond solitaire on a diamond-cut cable chain. Same metal, karat, and size options as the Round.
- **Emerald Vela Pendant**: Emerald-cut lab-grown diamond solitaire pendant. Same metal, karat, and size options.

#### Stud Earrings
- **Round Vela Studs**: Round brilliant lab-grown diamond studs with push-back butterfly closure. Available in 2ct tw and 4ct tw total weight. 14K and 18K gold in Yellow, White, and Rose.
- **Princess Vela Studs**: Princess-cut lab-grown diamond stud earrings. Same configuration options.
- **Emerald Vela Studs**: Emerald-cut lab-grown diamond stud earrings. Same configuration options.

#### Bracelets
- **Vela Bracelet**: Lab-grown diamond solitaire on a diamond-cut cable chain bracelet (7" with adjustable rings). Available in all metals and karats.
- **Vela Bracelet 2ct**: Larger 2ct version of the Vela Bracelet.

## Diamond Specifications
- **Type**: Lab-grown (CVD — Chemical Vapor Deposition)
- **Colour Grade**: D–F (colourless to near-colourless, top tier)
- **Clarity Grade**: VS1–VVS1 (very slightly included to very very slightly included)
- **Cut**: Ideal proportions for maximum brilliance and fire
- **Certification**: International Gemological Institute (IGI) — same grading standards as mined diamonds
- **Hardness**: 10 on the Mohs scale (identical to mined diamonds)
- **Chemical Composition**: Pure carbon, identical crystal structure to natural diamonds

## Lab-Grown Diamonds: Key Facts
- Lab-grown diamonds are real diamonds — same chemical composition, crystal structure, and optical properties as mined diamonds
- Created using Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD): a diamond seed is placed in a chamber with carbon-rich gases heated until carbon atoms crystallize on the seed
- Graded using the same 4Cs (Cut, Color, Clarity, Carat) by IGI
- 40–60% more affordable than mined diamonds of equivalent quality
- 100% conflict-free — no mining, no displacement, no exploitation
- Significantly lower environmental footprint than diamond mining

## Materials
- **Gold Options**: 14K Yellow Gold, 14K White Gold, 14K Rose Gold, 18K Yellow Gold, 18K White Gold, 18K Rose Gold
- **Chain Type**: Diamond-cut cable chain (pendants: 1.2mm, 18" length; bracelets: 7" length)
- **Closure**: Push-back butterfly (earrings), lobster clasp (bracelets/pendants)

## Shipping & Returns
- Free standard shipping on all orders
- Ships to Canada (5-7 business days) and United States (7-10 business days)
- Express shipping available (2-3 business days, $25 CAD)
- 30-day return policy for unworn items in original condition
- Free exchanges within 30 days
- Full insurance and signature required on delivery
